reason: Verify global no-Python-core, no descriptor-driven compute, and unified extension-family boundaries.
Verify production route uses extension-family ops through materialized EmitC rather than direct metadata/source export.
Verify deleted direct C/source-authority behavior is not restored.
Verify common code remains extension-neutral and RVV-specific logic stays plugin/target-local.
Verify focused lit, C++ tests, and RVV evidence reporting satisfy project testing policy.
